repo.name: vite
repo.description: Vite is a frontend build tool that provides a development server and optimized production builds.

sources.notes: Project positioning, package manager commands, and feature summary.

facts.value: Frontend tooling for a fast development server and optimized production builds.
Frontend projects need a quick development loop and a separate optimized production build.
Vite provides a development server and production build command for frontend projects.
The README documents npm create vite@latest as a starting command.
Vite includes a dev server workflow for frontend projects.
The project documents building frontend output for production.
Start a new frontend app from the command line.
